questions.question: Describe the difference between using `echo` and `printf` commands in a Unix environment. Provide an example of when you would use each.
questions.hint: Explain the usage of echo and printf commands

questions.question: List the contents of the /home/user/Documents directory and the users in the system on the same line, separated by a space. Use the `ls` and `who` commands in combination.
questions.hint: Use the -l option for ls and pipe the output to who

questions.question: Write a Unix command to get the current date and time, and also to display the first three lines of a file named 'example.txt'. Use the `date` and `head` commands in combination.
questions.hint: Use the pipe operator (|) to combine the commands
